'''âch-h-s''' ('''kachahas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pedestal|pedestal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pedestal|pedestal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-h-s
|-
! Lemma
| kachahas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichahas|thichahas]] || [[word:jichahas|jichahas]] || [[word:shichahas|shichahas]] || [[word:kichahas|kichahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchahas|thuthuchahas]] || [[word:jujuchahas|jujuchahas]] || [[word:shushuchahas|shushuchahas]] || [[word:kukuchahas|kukuchahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchahas|thuchahas]] || [[word:juchahas|juchahas]] || [[word:shuchahas|shuchahas]] || [[word:kuchahas|kuchahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchahas|thuchahas]] || [[word:juchahas|juchahas]] || [[word:shuchahas|shuchahas]] || [[word:kuchahas|kuchahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechahas|thechahas]] || [[word:jechahas|jechahas]] || [[word:shechahas|shechahas]] || [[word:kechahas|kechahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochahas|thothochahas]] || [[word:jojochahas|jojochahas]] || [[word:shoshochahas|shoshochahas]] || [[word:kokochahas|kokochahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochahas|thochahas]] || [[word:jochahas|jochahas]] || [[word:shochahas|shochahas]] || [[word:kochahas|kochahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochahas|thochahas]] || [[word:jochahas|jochahas]] || [[word:shochahas|shochahas]] || [[word:kochahas|kochahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchahas|thĂŠchahas]] || [[word:jĂŠchahas|jĂŠchahas]] || [[word:shĂŠchahas|shĂŠchahas]] || [[word:kĂŠchahas|kĂŠchahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachahas|thathachahas]] || [[word:jajachahas|jajachahas]] || [[word:shashachahas|shashachahas]] || [[word:kakachahas|kakachahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachahas|thachahas]] || [[word:jachahas|jachahas]] || [[word:shachahas|shachahas]] || [[word:kachahas|kachahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachahas|thachahas]] || [[word:jachahas|jachahas]] || [[word:shachahas|shachahas]] || [[word:kachahas|kachahas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachahas|shachahas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachahas|goshachahas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachahas|gokishachahas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachahasnĂŒ|shachahasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachahasnknĂŒ|goshachahasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahasnĂŒ|gokishachahasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachahashĂ«|shachahashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachahasnkshĂ«|goshachahasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachahashĂ«|gokishachahashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahasro|shachahasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahasnkro|goshachahasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahasro|gokishachahasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahasmu|shachahasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahasnkmu|goshachahasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahasmu|gokishachahasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachahasher|shachahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachahasnksher|goshachahasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachahasher|gokishachahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachahasng|shachahasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachahasnkng|goshachahasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachahasng|gokishachahasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachahasya|shachahasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachahasnkya|goshachahasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachahasya|gokishachahasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachahasyam|shachahasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachahasnkyam|goshachahasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachahasyam|gokishachahasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahasnĂŒshĂ«|shachahasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachahasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachahasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahasnĂŒro|shachahasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahasnknĂŒro|goshachahasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahasnĂŒro|gokishachahasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahasnĂŒmu|shachahasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahasnknĂŒmu|goshachahasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahasnĂŒmu|gokishachahasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahashĂ«nĂŒ|shachahashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachahasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachahashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahashĂ«ro|shachahashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahasnkshĂ«ro|goshachahasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahashĂ«ro|gokishachahashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahashĂ«mu|shachahashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahasnkshĂ«mu|goshachahasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahashĂ«mu|gokishachahashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahasronĂŒ|shachahasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahasnkronĂŒ|goshachahasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahasronĂŒ|gokishachahasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahasroshĂ«|shachahasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahasnkroshĂ«|goshachahasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahasroshĂ«|gokishachahasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahasromu|shachahasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahasnkromu|goshachahasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahasromu|gokishachahasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahasmunĂŒ|shachahasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahasnkmunĂŒ|goshachahasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahasmunĂŒ|gokishachahasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahasmushĂ«|shachahasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahasnkmushĂ«|goshachahasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahasmushĂ«|gokishachahasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahasmuro|shachahasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahasnkmuro|goshachahasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahasmuro|gokishachahasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
